flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Xavier University rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.3k → $28.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Xavier University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.5k → $50.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Xavier University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (5.1k → 4.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Xavier University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (70.5% vs 78.0%).
